description: A citizen wants to check the latest health inspection report for a specific restaurant.

nodes.task_description: Identify the restaurant the citizen is asking about.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the name and address of the restaurant.

nodes.task_description: Search the public database for the restaurant's inspection history.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the inspection records for the restaurant.

nodes.task_description: Provide the date and results of the most recent inspection, including the score and any violations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the results of the last inspection.
